caveats: The headline cash proxy is zero-yield cash, a conservative lower bound. A pass must not claim it needed T-bill yield; a later cash-yield sensitivity is separate.
The statistic is conditional PSR(0) for one frozen no-fit rule. The CPCV-min value is a worst-regime stress gate, not fitted-model validation.
The data venue is Binance Vision USDT spot. A pass is provisional until a US spot USD venue rebuild confirms the signal and returns near the 200-day threshold.
The signal is known after the Sunday UTC daily close and fills at Monday open. Rows without complete fill and exit opens are not scored.

cost_venue.name: kraken
cost_venue.source: Kraken Pro spot fee schedule (kraken.com/features/fee-schedule) + Kraken Futures derivatives fees (support.kraken.com/articles/360048917612), base tier, verified 2026-06
